title: CRITICAL THINKING - Fundamentals: Introduction to Critical Thinking [HD]
body: I am learning Critical Thinking in Business subject, which is included in my MBA journey. This video is really helpful for me. I can learn about critical thinking and argument. My favorite part of this video is about the two facts of argument, deductive and ampliative. I am clear about those two facts now. Thank you so much Geoff Pynn.
author: @nyeinkaythwe8718

title: CRITICAL THINKING - Fundamentals: Introduction to Critical Thinking [HD]
body: I sincerely want to congratulate this skilled lecturer. I really like the straight and short manner his presents Critical Thinking. It's very close to The New Rational Mind of Bachelard. So many people around us, and among them numerous high rank managers, suffer of egocentric and sociocentric pathology. They lean more on assumptions, prejudices and feelings than facts.

title: CRITICAL THINKING - Fundamentals: Introduction to Critical Thinking [HD]
body: this broadens the word "argument" to not just be defined as a debate on who is correct over a situation. but looking at the word argument more SIMPLY and raw. because we are people with brains and have the ability to think and elaborate whenever a statement is made, whether it be by us or others. we always think of reasons we might be skeptical or what proof or evidence gives us the reason to believe the argument aka statement is true.

title: Online Degree से Job नहीं मिली? - Don't make this mistake! #onlinedegree
body:
Complete NIU Details -

1. NIU is a UGC and NAAC A+ accredited private university in Greater Noida.

2. Recognized by BCI, PCI, INC, ensuring course validity for professional fields.

3. Offers a wide range of affordable online UG & PG programs, including MBA, MCA, BBA, etc.

4. Fees range: UG (₹56K–81K), PG (₹88.5K), lower than other universities charging ₹1L+.

5. Live classes, advanced LMS, industry-expert faculty, and updated job-friendly syllabus.

6. Scholarships available: merit-based (up to 100%) and need-based.

7. Placement rate: 78%, average package: ₹5 LPA, highest: ₹43 LPA.

8. Admission is online, simple, and mostly merit-based.

Connect with our experts to clear all your queries for FREE on WhatsApp: https://wa.me/918585910435
